receipts.hypothesis: SVM margin and kernel geometry may expose probability shape, signal density, and validation/OOS preservation behavior that differs from LogReg, LightGBM, ExtraTrees, and MLP.
receipts.baseline: No trading baseline. Stage14 starts from the closed data, label, split, and 58-feature input contract only.
invalid_conditions: Importing Stage10/11/12/13 thresholds or context gates as a baseline
Claiming alpha quality, edge, promotion, runtime authority, or selected baseline before evidence exists
evidence_plan: Stage14 stage brief and input references
Stage14 stage run ledger when runs exist
Project alpha ledger and run registry rows when runs exist
State sync audit for open state

receipts.exploration_lane: Stage14 independent SVM margin/kernel model-family exploration design
receipts.idea_boundary: topic pivot open; no baseline or operating selection
receipts.negative_memory_effect: Stage13 MLP clues are preserved but not inherited as a baseline.
receipts.operating_claim_boundary: No alpha quality, edge, promotion candidate, operating promotion, runtime authority, or selected baseline.

receipts.hashes_or_missing_reasons: No model, ONNX, MT5, or run artifact exists yet because Stage14 was only opened.
receipts.lineage_boundary: stage open lineage only; no runtime or trading-result claim.

receipts.environment_assumptions: Windows PowerShell workspace on branch codex/stage14, with existing Python and MT5 paths preserved.
receipts.dependency_or_runtime_surface: No new dependency, model training, or MT5 runtime run was introduced by the stage open.
receipts.clean_checkout_boundary: Stage14 scaffold is tracked text evidence and can be reproduced from git.
receipts.reproducibility_gaps: First SVM run has not been executed, so model artifact reproducibility remains future work.
